lokesh.name: Lokesh

beliefs.content: New models are being launched frequently, making it difficult to prepare and keep up with the latest developments.
evidence: नया नया मॉडल आ रहा है डेली पे डेली

beliefs.content: It's challenging to acquire new skills before new models or technologies emerge.
evidence: कोई स्किल सीखो उससे पहले मॉडल आ जा रहा है

beliefs.content: Relationships are temporary and people move on with their lives

beliefs.content: As one gets busy with work and life, new people will come into their life
